title: Creamy Vietnamese Rice Wrap
description: A fatty and silky Vietnamese dish featuring seasoned rice vinegar and namul-blanch-season, perfect for a monsoon day. This vegetarian-friendly dish is wrapped in a ti-leaf vessel.
instructions: Prepare the seasoned rice vinegar by mixing it with sugar and salt in a small bowl.
Cook the jasmine rice according to package instructions.
Blanch and season the namul in boiling water for 2 minutes.
Prepare the filling by mixing the cooked rice, namul, mung bean sprouts, carrots, cucumber, and tofu in a large bowl.
Add the peanut sauce to the filling and mix well.
Lay a ti leaf flat on a work surface and add about 1/2 cup of the filling in the center of the leaf.
Fold the bottom half of the leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the leaf to form a tight wrap.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 12 wraps.
Serve the wraps immediately and enjoy.
